evals.prompt: 변경된 코드에 대해 종합 웹 품질 검토를 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 5개 영역 순차 실행, 통합 리포트 생성
expectations: Executes all 5 review areas (Accessibility, BP, SEO, Performance, CWV)
Analyzes actual target files in each area
Identifies specific issues per area with item IDs
Generates unified report combining all areas

evals.prompt: 접근성이랑 SEO만 검토해줘. 나머지는 안 해도 돼
expectations: Executes only Accessibility and SEO review areas
Skips Best Practices, Performance, and CWV areas
Analyzes target files for accessibility issues
Analyzes target files for SEO issues
Generates partial report for selected areas only

evals.prompt: 성능과 Core Web Vitals만 집중 분석해줘. 특히 이미지 최적화 관련해서
evals.expected_output: Performance(11항목)과 CWV(11항목) 실행, 이미지 항목 강조
expectations: Executes Performance and CWV review areas
Skips Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO areas
Identifies specific image optimization issues in target files
